overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along the Del Perro beach promenade. The character passes by the iconic blue Muscle Sands Gym building with white arches, various beachfront shops, and palm tree lines during a sunny afternoon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beachfront plaza with market stalls

events.description: character turns left toward the palm tree line and grassy area
approaching the entrance of the blue arched building

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the blue building, passing market stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of ego

entered.detail: colorful storefront with signage and outdoor displays
outdoor vendor stalls with colorful awnings
distinctive bright blue building with white architectural arches
tall palm trees lining the beachside area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open sunlit plaza with market stalls on the right and palm trees on the left. The distinctive blue building with white arches dominates the view ahead as the character turns slightly left toward the tree line before approaching the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along blue arched building facade

events.description: passing a pink sports car parked on the adjacent street
walking into shadow cast by the building arches

agents.ego_description: walking along the blue building facade observing the architectural arches and storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction past the blue building columns

entered.detail: bright pink convertible sports car parked by the curb
city skyscrapers visible in the distance beyond the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk adjacent to the blue building with white arches, passing into the building's shadow. A pink sports car is parked on the right with the downtown skyline visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction along the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: open promenade with red restaurant awnings

events.description: exiting the blue building shade into open sunlit promenade
passing closed storefronts with metal security gates

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade past outdoor seating and restaurant areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead on the promenade

entered.detail: bright red striped awnings over restaurant fronts
metal roll-down security gates on closed storefronts
restaurant with purple awning and signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the blue building's shadow into an open sunlit promenade lined with red restaurant awnings on the right. The area features closed storefronts with metal gates and the pizza shop becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boardwalk with pizza shop and retail stores

events.description: entering denser commercial area with active storefronts and merchandise displays
slight left turn to navigate around pedestrians and follow the boardwalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy commercial boardwalk browsing shop fronts and avoiding other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian browsing t-shirt merchandise displayed outside the shop

entered.detail: store with colorful merchandise displays and signage outside
concrete benches along the walking path for seating
building with for lease signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser commercial section of the boardwalk featuring the pizza shop with purple awning, t-shirt stores with outdoor displays, and concrete benches. The crowd density increases as pedestrians browse the various shop fronts, and the character navigates through the busier area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit beach plaza that gradually transitions into a bustling commercial boardwalk. It begins in an open plaza with market stalls and palm trees, moving toward a distinctive blue building with white arches. As the character passes the building, the scene shifts into a cool shadow where a pink sports car is parked against a backdrop of the distant downtown skyline. The camera then emerges back into the sunlight, gliding past red restaurant awnings and closed storefronts before turning toward a denser shopping district. Finally, the environment opens into a crowded promenade featuring a purple-awninged pizza shop and t-shirt stores, where the character navigates through an increasing density of pedestrians.
